title: Squirrel Removal in Amityville, NY | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Amityville, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic restoration. Licensed experts serving Amityville homes. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert squirrel removal services throughout Amityville, Long Island, protecting your home from costly damage and health risks. Our licensed technicians specialize in humane squirrel trapping, complete attic exclusion, and damage restoration for Amityville's historic homes and waterfront properties. With over a decade of experience serving Long Island communities, we deliver fast, effective, and guaranteed squirrel control solutions.
whyUs: Our Amityville squirrel removal specialists respond quickly to service calls throughout the village and surrounding neighborhoods, offering same-day inspections and customized removal plans. We combine humane wildlife control methods with comprehensive exclusion work to ensure squirrels don't return, backed by our written guarantee and competitive pricing from $900-$2,500.
localContext: Amityville's beautiful tree-lined streets and proximity to Great South Bay create ideal habitats for squirrels that frequently invade attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces in the area's Victorian homes and ranch-style residences. From properties near the Amityville Historical Society to homes along the waterfront, our team understands the unique pest control challenges facing this Suffolk County community.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Amityville?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Amityville typically ranges from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of attic damage. This includes humane trapping, complete exclusion sealing, and a warranty against re-entry. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all Amityville properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Amityville home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service throughout Amityville and can typically begin trapping immediately after inspection. Most squirrel removal projects are completed within 3-7 days, though larger infestations may require additional time. Our team works efficiently to safely remove all squirrels and seal entry points as quickly as possible.

faqs.question: What damage can squirrels cause in Amityville attics?
faqs.answer: Squirrels in Amityville homes commonly chew through electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), damage insulation, gnaw on wooden beams and rafters, and contaminate attics with urine and droppings. They can also compromise your home's structural integrity by enlarging entry holes in soffits, fascia, and roof vents. Prompt removal prevents these costly repairs from escalating.

faqs.question: Do you offer humane squirrel removal in Amityville?
faqs.answer: Yes, we exclusively use humane, live-catch traps that safely capture squirrels without harm. After removal, we relocate them in accordance with New York State wildlife regulations. Our exclusion methods prevent re-entry while allowing any remaining squirrels to exit safely through one-way doors, ensuring ethical treatment throughout the entire process.
